validation_results.fls_crud: n/a (queries Template_Mapping__c — system context via Flow invocation; with sharing applied)

notes: First deploy failed with 'Unexpected token: in' — `in` is a reserved Apex keyword (loop variable in `for (x in list)`). Renamed the loop variable to `req`. Second deploy passed.

@TestSetup builds 1 Document_Template__c + 2 Template_Version__c (Draft) + 4 Template_Mapping__c (one pre-stamped) — used by all 4 functional tests. Bulk test inserts 200 more versions × 2 mappings within Test.startTest().

Public API: TemplateVersionApprovalHandler.stampApproval(List<Input>) where Input is a wrapper with @InvocableVariable templateVersionId. Wrapper required because Flow's Apex Action only passes named fields.
